name: Dan Abnett
bio: British novelist and comics writer. Long-running Black Library author; Eisenhorn, Ravenor, Gaunt's Ghosts, and Horus Rising are among his Warhammer 40,000 anchors.

name: Guy Haley
bio: British science-fiction and fantasy author. Black Library novelist; Dark Imperium, Belisarius Cawl: The Great Work, Avenging Son, and several Horus Heresy / Siege of Terra entries.

name: Aaron Dembski-Bowden
bio: British science-fiction author. Black Library mainstay; The First Heretic, Master of Mankind, Soul Hunter, Helsreach, The Talon of Horus, and the Black Legion duology are anchors of his bibliography.

name: Graham McNeill
bio: Scottish novelist. Black Library veteran; Storm of Iron, the Ultramarines novels, the Priests of Mars trilogy, and several Horus Heresy entries (Mechanicum, A Thousand Sons).

name: Sandy Mitchell
bio: Pseudonym of British author Alex Stewart. Best known for the Ciaphas Cain series — first-person memoirs of an Imperial Commissar that play 40k for satire while keeping the lore.

name: Gav Thorpe
bio: British author and game designer. Long-time Black Library writer; Path of the Eldar trilogy, Angels of Caliban, Deliverance Lost, and a steady stream of Aeldari and Dark Angels work.

name: Chris Wraight
bio: British science-fiction and fantasy author. Black Library novelist; Vaults of Terra trilogy, Watchers of the Throne, several Space Wolves and White Scars novels.

name: Nate Crowley
bio: British author and journalist. Black Library novelist with a comedic, character-forward voice; Ghazghkull Thraka: Prophet of the Waaagh!, Severed, and Twice-Dead King duology.

name: Robert Rath
bio: American author and games journalist. Black Library novelist; The Infinite and the Divine (a Necron buddy-rivalry comedy spanning sixty millennia) and the Assassinorum: Kingmaker novel.

name: Phil Kelly
bio: British game designer and author. Black Library novelist with deep T'au experience; Farsight: Crisis of Faith, Farsight: Empire of Lies, and several Codex / rulebook lore entries.

name: Rachel Harrison
bio: British author. Black Library novelist; Mark of Faith and the Severina Raine / Honourbound novels — Adepta Sororitas and Astra Militarum protagonists.

name: Ben Counter
bio: British author. Black Library long-runner; Soul Drinkers series, Grey Knights trilogy, and several Horus Heresy entries (Battle for the Abyss, Galaxy in Flames).
